examples.title: Algorithm: Mutual Exclusion using TestAndSet
examples.description: Demonstrates hardware-level mutual exclusion using TestAndSet instruction for critical section access.
examples.code:
ALGORITHM MutualExclusion
BEGIN
 WHILE TestAndSet(&lock) == 1 DO
 // Busy wait
 END WHILE
 // Critical section
 lock = false
END
examples.explanation:
1. TestAndSet atomically checks and sets the lock
2. Busy waits until lock is free (returns 0)
3. Exits loop to enter critical section
4. Releases lock by setting to false

examples.title: Spinlock Implementation using TestAndSet
examples.description: C code implementing a spinlock for synchronization using TestAndSet hardware instruction.
examples.explanation:
1. TestAndSet checks and sets lock in atomic operation
2. acquire_spinlock() loops until lock is acquired
3. release_spinlock() releases the lock

examples.title: Algorithm: Atomic Counter Increment
examples.description: Using TestAndSet to safely increment a shared counter in concurrent environments.
examples.code:
ALGORITHM AtomicIncrement
BEGIN
 WHILE TestAndSet(&lock) == 1 DO
 // Busy wait
 END WHILE
 counter = counter + 1
 lock = false
END
examples.explanation:
1. Acquire lock using TestAndSet
2. Increment counter in critical section
3. Release lock after update
